summary:
I've built the TAON-1 site. Task tracking isn't necessary here — the work is a single-pass static site build that's now complete.
All 10 files are in place. Here's the summary:

## TAON-1 / TORNADO ALLEY OPERATIONS NETWORK — build complete

A 7-page experimental utilitarian dashboard for the storm-chasing community, executed in radar-green IBM Plex Mono on near-black with amber-only escalation, ASCII rules, and CSS/SVG-rendered radar mosaics (no external assets).

**Pages**
- `index.html` — four-quadrant ops console: CSS-rendered CONUS doppler mosaic with sweep + chaser pins, SPC outlook with D1/D2/D3 tab switching (inline SVG), chaser ping ticker, LSR rolling feed, persistent PACKET STATUS bar, CAPE/SRH/EHI readout strip
- `logs.html` — filter rail (year, CWA, EF, mode, callsign) + sortable log table with expandable rows containing GPS-track SVG, hodograph SVG, and narrative
- `gear.html` — category nav + spec mini-card grid (SVG icons) + comparison cart rail with localStorage persistence (max 4 items)
- `spotters.html` — pinned briefings, collapsible CWA accordion (OUN/DDC/AMA/FWD/ICT/OAX/GLD/UNR) with sparklines, threaded discussion view with `>` quote nesting, net-control rotation table
- `calendar.html` — May 2026 month grid with categorical risk shading (MRGL→HIGH amber escalation), JS-driven side panel rendering hazard matrix + RSVPs + rendezvous on day click, historic outbreak anniversaries strip, ICS export
- `gallery.html` — filter chips + masonry of 12 SVG-rendered supercell stand-ins, each with EXIF strip + callsign; lightbox with radar-at-time-of-shot overlay toggle; photographer leaderboard
- `roster.html` — searchable callsign directory + QSL-style printable card + top-down SVG rig schematic with equipment manifest

**Interactions (vanilla JS):** live UTC clock + chaser count + last-strike timer; expand log rows; gear cart with localStorage; CWA accordion; calendar day → side panel; gallery filters; lightbox with radar overlay; callsign hover-cards; SPC tab swap; roster search.

**Required text:** "TORNADO ALLEY OPERATIONS NETWORK", "TAON-1", "PACKET STATUS", and the amber "NOT AN OFFICIAL NWS PRODUCT" disclaimer appear on every page (nav pill + footer).

**Files written**
- `index.html`, `logs.html`, `gear.html`, `spotters.html`, `calendar.html`, `gallery.html`, `roster.html`
- `css/style.css` (927 lines — shared design system with responsive collapse)
- `js/app.js` (vanilla ES5, no deps)
- `site_intent.json`
All 10 files are in place. Here's the summary:
